2603.16435.title: VQKV: High-Fidelity and High-Ratio Cache Compression via Vector-Quantization
2603.16435.paper_summary: The growing context length of Large Language Models (LLMs) enlarges the Key-Value (KV) cache, limiting deployment in resource-limited environments. Prior training-free approaches for KV cache compression typically rely on low-rank approximation or scalar quantization, which fail to simultaneously achieve high compression ratios and high reconstruction fidelity. We propose VQKV, a novel, training-free method introducing vector quantization (VQ) to obtain highly compressed KV representations while preserving high model fidelity, allowing for the representation of thousands of floating-point values with just a few integer indices. As a result, VQKV achieves an 82.8\% compression ratio on LLaMA3.1-8B while retaining 98.6\% of the baseline performance on LongBench and enabling 4.3x longer generation length on the same memory footprint.
2603.16435.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）日益增長的上下文長度擴大了鍵值（KV）快取，限制了在資源有限的環境中的部署。<lb/> 先前的無需訓練的KV快取壓縮方法通常依賴於低秩近似或標量量化，這些方法無法同時實現高壓縮比和高重建保真度。<lb/> 我們提出了VQKV，一種新穎的無需訓練的方法，通過引入向量量化（VQ）來獲得高度壓縮的KV表示，同時保持高模型保真度，允許僅用幾個整數索引表示數千個浮點值。<lb/> 因此，VQKV在LLaMA3.1-8B上達到了82.8\%的壓縮比，同時在LongBench上保留了98.6\%的基線性能，並在相同的內存佔用下實現了4.3倍更長的生成長度。
2603.16435.author: Yixuan Wang et.al.
2603.16435.authors: Yixuan Wang, Qingyu Shi, Jiayu Zhou, Dianbo Liu, Ziwei He, Zhouhan Lin
